message:
Running command: 
# Step 71 created! DRT is re-running.
# Pipe drainer is running but slow - let me make it more aggressive

# Kill old slow drainer
kill 1101734 2>/dev/null

LIBPID=1100961

# Start a more aggressive drainer with very fast polling
nohup bash -c "
PIPE=/proc/$LIBPID/fd/11
LOG=/tmp/drt2_pipe.log
echo 'Fast drainer started' >> \$LOG
while [ -e \"\$PIPE\" ]; do
  # Read 1MB at a time, no waiting
  dd if=\"\$PIPE\" bs=65536 count=16 oflag=nonblock >> \$LOG 2>/dev/null
  sleep 0.5
done
echo 'Fast drainer done' >> \$LOG
" > /dev/null 2>&1 &
echo "Fast drainer: $!"

sleep 10
echo "=== $(date) ==="
wc -l /tmp/drt2_pipe.log
tail -30 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log
echo "---"
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}'
